creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
In order to remove www/mozilla we need to move some files from www/mozilla
	to www/seamonkey. Could you please repo-copy these files:

	www/mozilla/pkg-install.in -> www/seamonkey/pkg-install.in
	www/mozilla/pkg-deinstall.in -> www/seamonkey/pkg-deinstall.in
	www/mozilla/files/mozconfig-generic.in -> www/seamonkey/files/mozconfig-generic.in
